package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionString() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_combines_unrelated_write_paths_via_action_string"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that branch on action strings to implement many create, update, or delete variants in one method."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
